message:
Fix symlink escape and recursive loop handling in preview server

Harden preview asset resolution, file counting, and live-reload token
to reject symlinks that escape the bundle root and avoid infinite loops
from cyclic symlinks. Adds resolve_preview_asset_path with canonical
path confinement, visited-dir tracking in recursive helpers, and
millisecond-precision modified tokens. Includes unix regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
